MACHINES._README: CONFIRMED facts only. Do not guess. Verify here before any deployment decision.

laptop.role: DEV ONLY — Claude Desktop + Desktop Commander. Not always-on. Never run persistent services here.
laptop.claudeclaw_source: C:\Users\bermi\Projects\claudeclaw\ (LOCAL ONLY — not in GitHub yet)
laptop.ssh_to_others: Use paramiko Python library — native SSH hangs on password prompt in cmd/powershell

mini_pc.role: ALWAYS-ON SERVICES HOST — ClaudeClaw, supervisor, watchdog, Telegram bots run here.
mini_pc.remote_access: SSH via paramiko (password auth). Use paramiko, not native ssh command.
mini_pc.ssh_example: import paramiko; c=paramiko.SSHClient(); c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy()); c.connect('100.122.16.111', username='michael', password='Bedrooms1985!', timeout=10)

nas.remote_access: SSH (key-based, works). pscp for file uploads.
nas.n8n_critical: N8N_USER_FOLDER=/home/node/.n8n MUST be set in docker-compose or n8n reads stale DB

gpu_box.role: COMPUTE ONLY — ComfyUI, image gen, heavy AI workloads. NOT a server.
gpu_box.remote_access: Parsec (visual/GUI only). No SSH. No WinRM working. Cannot script remotely.
gpu_box.never_deploy_here: Do not deploy Telegram bots, supervisors, or any always-on service. GPU box may sleep.

SERVICE_DEPLOYMENT_MAP._README: Where each service runs. Do not change without updating this map.

claudeclaw_telegram_bot.reason: Always-on Linux host. SSH accessible. Never sleeps.
claudeclaw_telegram_bot.status: NOT YET DEPLOYED — source is on laptop only
claudeclaw_telegram_bot.deploy_method: Push source to GitHub, pull on mini-pc via paramiko, npm install, pm2 start

supervisor_py.reason: Must be co-located with claudeclaw to monitor it

watchdog_py.reason: Monitors supervisor + claudeclaw + n8n. Must be on always-on machine.
watchdog_py.status: NOT YET DEPLOYED to mini-pc — currently written to laptop only as interim
watchdog_py.scheduler: pm2 or cron (every 5 min) — NOT Windows Task Scheduler

foreman_py.reason: Called by n8n via Execute Command node — runs on laptop where apex/ lives

apex_hub.note: n8n on NAS polls this via network share or Execute Command

PH-06.name: ClaudeClaw TypeScript
PH-06.note: @Brianbrainboxbot online on laptop. Annie bot 401 (separate issue).

PH-08.name: Watchdog — migrate to mini-pc
PH-08.note: watchdog.py written to laptop. ARCHITECTURE DECISION: supervisor + claudeclaw + watchdog must move to mini-pc (always-on). Laptop deployment is wrong target.
blockers: SSH to mini-pc requires paramiko not native cmd
next_actions: 2. Deploy to mini-pc via paramiko: clone, npm install, create .env, pm2 start
3. Deploy supervisor.py to mini-pc, pm2 start
4. Deploy watchdog.py to mini-pc, cron every 5min
5. Update watchdog.py targets to use mini-pc paths (not Windows paths)
6. Cert: kill claudeclaw on mini-pc, confirm watchdog restarts it, Telegram alert received

health.annie_bot: 401 UNAUTHORIZED — token invalid (known issue, fix separately)

ssh_to_mini_pc.method: paramiko Python library ONLY — native ssh/cmd hangs on password prompt

ssh_to_nas.method: native SSH or pscp — key-based auth works

foreman.idempotency: rejects duplicate job_id already in audit/

tool_knowledge.n8n_docker_recreate: export PATH=/share/CE_CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/bin:$PATH; cd /share/CE_CACHEDEV1_DATA/Container; docker rm -f n8n; docker compose up -d n8n

berm_receipt_ocr.next: Configure Google SA credentials + test pipeline

known_issues.annie_bot_401: Update ANNIE_BOT_TOKEN in claudeclaw/.env and restart claudeclaw
known_issues.claudeclaw_wrong_machine: ClaudeClaw currently runs on laptop (wrong). Must move to mini-pc.
known_issues.watchdog_wrong_machine: watchdog.py written to laptop (wrong). Must deploy to mini-pc with Linux paths.

session_start_protocol: 1. Read MACHINES section — confirm which machine a task targets before doing anything
2. SSH to mini-pc = paramiko only (not native cmd ssh)
4. Check SERVICE_DEPLOYMENT_MAP for where each service should run
5. Never deploy persistent services to laptop or gpu_box
